scripts.contract:pull: rm -rf /tmp/grew-tv-contract tests/.contract && git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse https://github.com/DanGrew/grew-tv.git /tmp/grew-tv-contract && git -C /tmp/grew-tv-contract sparse-checkout set media-manager/tests/contract && mkdir -p tests/.contract && cp /tmp/grew-tv-contract/media-manager/tests/contract/*.json tests/.contract/
